verses.1: Preserve me, God, for I take refuge in you.
verses.2: My soul, you have said to the LORD, “You are my Lord.
verses.3: As for the saints who are in the earth,
verses.4: Their sorrows shall be multiplied who give gifts to another god.
verses.5: The LORD assigned my portion and my cup.
verses.6: The lines have fallen to me in pleasant places.
verses.7: I will bless the LORD, who has given me counsel.
verses.8: I have set the LORD always before me.
verses.9: Therefore my heart is glad, and my tongue rejoices.
verses.10: For you will not leave my soul in Sheol,
verses.11: You will show me the path of life.
